Name: Everyone I’ve Never Met
Description: If I have to ask someone for their name, major, and hometown one more time, I will implode. On “Everyone I’ve Never Met,” I invite personal campus celebrities to join me for a quick chat about who and how they really are. I try my best to not make it weird, but I never make that a promise, especially as I ask strangers what the true meaning of life is. Tune in live on Dartmouth College Radio every Sunday from 6-7 pm to get to know everyone you’ve never met.

Name: Hijos del Quijote
Description: Tune in and practice your Spanish comprehension in weekly readings of Hispanic short stories by classic Hispanic authors! New author every term! This term: Horacio Quiroga.

Name: WebDCR News
Description: WebDCR News strives to provide quality, informative coverage of the topics which affect our listeners’ world the most. Whether local, national, or international news, we provide listeners the information they need to form their own opinions through a variety of formats.

Name: Lobster Telephone
Description: Lobster Telephone is a radio show rooted in the idea that music is art…and art is subjective. With an open mind and no genre limits, the show celebrates music’s power through the unexpected, inspired by Dalí’s line: “I do not understand why, when I ask for a grilled lobster… I am never served a cooked telephone.”

Name: GET OUTTA BED(rot)
Description: Just as Beloved is Toni Morrison’s stream of consciousness, GET OUTTA BED(rot) is Alexandra Blee’s! It will be music across all genres and conversations of whatever’s on her mind, be it personal stories or the weather. Get ready for Lana Del Rey, Tame Impala, Travis Scott, Metro Boomin, George Strait, Vivaldi and so much more!!

Name: Deep Dive
Description: Here's a space, warm and lightly spiced. Join me and a special guest (which can be you!) as we talk deep stuff: everything that is not material but real to us; god? love? life? All of it and more. 1. come and find pieces of yourself in someone else: I reckon we're all in this together, more connected and deeply similar than we know. 2. or if you're curious - i.e. slightly nosy, like me - here's a peek into what's often restricted access. Warning: contains comfortable silences.

Name: Seeking Attention

Name: Stranger Danger
Description: Get to know random people on campus via the New York Times 36 Questions To Fall in Love!

Name: ON TOP OF SPRING
Description: “On Top of Spring” is the accidental‑on‑purpose brainchild of Sarah and Jabari, two people who became friends junior year through a series of unhinged coincidences, chaotic lore drops, and moments that can only be described as… flames. From that beautiful mess, the phoenix rose, and now we’re here: spreading laughter, love, and unserious joy to anyone who needs a little spring in their week. Tune in for stories, spirals, hot takes, and the kind of friendship energy that feels like sunshine after a long Hanover winter.
